description_long: This is a pair of stylish cat-eye glasses with a full-rim frame featuring a marbled tortoiseshell pattern in shades of brown, amber, and cream. The frame is thick and bold, with a pronounced upward sweep at the outer edges, giving it a retro-inspired, fashionable look. The lenses are large, round, and clear, set securely within the frame. The temples are straight and moderately thick, transitioning from the marbled pattern at the front to a solid reddish-brown color towards the ear tips, which are finished in black for comfort. The bridge is a simple, integrated design that smoothly connects the two lenses without any visible nose pads. No visible brand logo or insignia is present on the frame or temples.
description: A bold, cat-eye pair of glasses with a marbled tortoiseshell frame and large, clear round lenses. The temples are straight with a color transition and black tips.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cat-eye shape, marbled pattern, and large round lenses.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the frame, the straight temple, and the color transition to black at the tip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inside of the frame, the full sweep of the temples, and the black ear tips.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the left, showing the temple's thickness and color transition.
attribute_frame_design: Cat-eye shape with a thick, bold, full-rim structure. The frame has a pronounced upward sweep at the outer edges and a smooth, continuous rim around the lenses.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are clear and transparent with no visible tint, gradient, or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: Integrated saddle bridge, smoothly connecting the two lenses without separate nose pads or additional features.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight and moderately thick, transitioning from the marbled pattern at the front to a solid reddish-brown and ending in black tips. No engravings or embellishments are visible.
